name: Pacifica Northwest
description:
"When do you plan to get in"

Pacifica Elise Northwest is the most popular girl in Gravity Falls and probably the great-great-granddaughter of supposed town founder Nathaniel Northwest. In the summer of 2012, during the stay of Dipper and Mabel Pines in Gravity Falls, Pacifica ended up forming a great rivalry with them, especially with Mabel. However, more interactions with her former foes and common people have led Pacifica to abandon her family's conceited attitude and their long, hidden history of crime, treachery, and cover-ups. Pacifica represents the llama symbol associated with the Bill Cipher Zodiac, due to her being given one of Mabel's sweaters that bears said symbol in the finale.

This version in question of Pacifica Elise Northwest is an alternate universe (AU) based on an artist's interpretation, not a direct continuation of the original minor character from the show.

Artist of the Image: Banjabu
creator: THE_honored_ONE
